---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.randomise"
generated: true
signature-hash: 899c56b61523b583
description: "Permutation inference for the general linear model."
listing:
  id: nitrix-stats-inference-randomise-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-stats-inference-randomise/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.randomise`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Permutation inference for the general linear model.

`permutation_test` is a non-parametric, family-wise-error-controlling
test of a general linear model (GLM) contrast over a statistic image, built
from the parts in this subpackage.  It is an on-device analogue of the FSL
`randomise` tool.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `n_perm` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-stats-inference-randomise-symbols}
:::
